description: Example showing how requirement_coverage.expected_evidence[] and requirement_kind should appear in a Review-Grade rules.rich.json. This is not a real methodology artifact — it demonstrates the target shape for schema validation.

expected_evidence.label: Project Boundary GIS File
expected_evidence.description: GeoJSON or shapefile defining the project area boundary with verified coordinates.

expected_evidence.label: Land Tenure Documentation
expected_evidence.description: Legal title, deed, lease, or government concession evidencing right to implement the project on the land area.

expected_evidence.label: Land Cover Classification Map
expected_evidence.description: Classified land cover map showing forest/non-forest strata within the project boundary.

expected_evidence.label: Carbon Fraction Parameter Sheet
expected_evidence.description: Parameter sheet documenting the carbon fraction value (CF), source reference, and uncertainty bounds.

expected_evidence.label: Default Emissions Factor Reference
expected_evidence.description: Published default emissions factor with IPCC or national source citation if overriding methodology defaults.

expected_evidence.label: Annual Monitoring Report
expected_evidence.description: Annual monitoring report documenting forest carbon stock changes, disturbance events, and QA/QC results.

monitoring_report.expectation: Report must include: plot-by-plot carbon stock estimates, disturbance tracking, and QA/QC results.

expected_evidence.label: Monitoring Period Satellite Imagery
expected_evidence.description: Satellite imagery covering the monitoring period for change detection within the project boundary.

expected_evidence.label: Net GHG Removals Calculation Workbook
expected_evidence.description: Workbook calculating net GHG removals per the methodology equations, with all input parameters and intermediate values traceable to source sections.

expected_evidence.label: Emissions Reductions Summary
expected_evidence.description: Summary table of ex-post emissions reductions by year, stratified by carbon pool and leakage category.
